summary: Rider Onboarding Module Testing Complete - All core features working. Backend APIs (18/18 tests passed after fixing route order bug). Frontend onboarding form works with proper validation. SEO pages correctly link to /join-as-rider. Admin panel shows rider applications with approve/reject/ban functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route order bug in server.py - /admin/rider-applications/stats was defined AFTER /admin/rider-applications/{application_id}, causing 'stats' to be matched as an application_id. Moved stats endpoint before the dynamic route.
Backend validation correctly rejects applications without all legal agreements accepted
Duplicate application detection works - prevents same mobile from submitting multiple pending applications
Admin endpoints properly protected with role-based access control (admin, rider_admin)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test rider applications during testing (prefixed with TEST, APPROVE, REJECT, BAN)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rider onboarding module is fully functional. Backend APIs work correctly. Frontend form has 6 steps with proper validation. SEO pages link correctly to /join-as-rider. Admin panel shows applications with full CRUD operations.

Rider_Onboarding_Form_Step1.details: Basic Details step with Name, Mobile, City validation. Shows area selection for supported cities. Validation errors display correctly.

Rider_Onboarding_Form_Step2.details: KYC Verification step with Aadhaar, PAN, Selfie upload fields. Validation prevents proceeding without required documents.

Backend_POST_rider_applications.details: Accepts valid applications with all legal agreements. Rejects incomplete applications and duplicates.

Backend_GET_check_mobile.details: Returns exists:true/false with status for existing applications.

Backend_Admin_List_Applications.details: Returns paginated list with status and city filters.

Backend_Admin_Stats.details: Returns by_status, by_city counts and total. Fixed route order bug.

Backend_Admin_Review.details: Approve/reject applications. Creates rider user account on approval.

Backend_Admin_Ban.details: Bans rider and updates user status if exists.

SEO_Earn_Money_Page.details: Page loads with earnings calculator, stats, testimonials. 'Start Earning Today' CTA links to /join-as-rider.

SEO_City_Rider_Page.details: City-specific page with local stats. 'Join Now in Mohali' CTA links to /join-as-rider.

Admin_Rider_Applications_Panel.details: Shows stats cards (Total, Pending, Approved, Rejected, Banned), search/filter, applications table with approve/reject/ban actions.

bug_fixed.issue: Route order bug - /admin/rider-applications/stats returned 404 'Application not found'
bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI route matching - /admin/rider-applications/{application_id} was defined before /admin/rider-applications/stats, so 'stats' was being matched as an application_id
bug_fixed.fix: Moved stats endpoint definition before the dynamic {application_id} route in server.py

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - rider applications stored in MongoDB
